summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently. No shared canonical was selected. No close, merge, fix, or PR-raising actions are allowed or safe from this job. Focused open PRs with green checks or active review signals are kept open for maintainer review; PRs with unresolved review-bot findings, failed proof checks, broad scope, or product-direction questions are scoped needs_human. Security-sensitive linked closed refs are quarantined non-mutatingly.

actions.reason: Focused bug-fix PR should stay open; final technical correctness and maintainer review are outside this close/comment-only inventory job.
Focused bug-fix PR with active author signal and green checks should remain open for maintainer review.
Narrow non-security automation/doctor PR should stay open; maintainer review is required before any merge decision.
Unresolved review-bot findings and failed proof check require maintainer/author follow-up; no close or fix action is allowed.
Needs human/author decision on unresolved review-bot findings and failed proof; no mutation is safe in this job.
This is a product-direction/session-state default decision with review concerns; it requires maintainer judgment.
Technical correctness and unresolved proof/review state require human or author follow-up; no close/fix action is permitted.
Broad feature/diagnostics PR needs maintainer product and technical review; inventory worker should not close or canonicalize it.
Unresolved review-bot findings and failing checks require author/maintainer follow-up; no fix/close action is enabled.
Unresolved review-bot findings and failed proof/checks require human or author follow-up.
Security-sensitive linked ref is out of ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup scope and should be routed centrally.
Security-sensitive linked ref is out of ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup scope and should be routed centrally.
